ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of using a joystick, focusing on the hands' interaction with the control.  The robot will mimic holding and manipulating the joystick with both hands.  I will use a five-frame animation to capture the nuance of this action.  The key is to make the movement realistic, but also simple enough for the robot's arm structure.  I'll leverage the two shoulder-like joints for each arm to achieve this.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready to grip the joystick
hands move to grip and tilt the joystick left and right
hands return to center, releasing control
arms rest again, the game is paused
